textPlain: This would have been great when I was learning Lisp in school! I tried emacs but due to joint issues the keybinds were painful to use, so I gave up and did the course in vim+SBCL's REPL instead.
I was always bummed OniVim v2 didn't take off.It was a native IDE but fully supported VS Code plugin system.https://web.archive.org/web/20210627210456/https://v2.onivim...
